issue:
I am facing an blocker while doing compatible check all the criterias are matching other than zoom
connectivity. Due to which i am unable to take the test. I have done all through my way by
changing the settings and system configurations but still showing error
subject: I am facing an blocker while doing compatible check
response:
For Zoom connectivity issues during the compatibility check, HackerRank Interviews use Zoom integration that offers several benefits to help with connectivity problems:

• No Zoom account or software installation is required
• High-quality audio and video are maintained, even on slow internet connections
• Video can be turned off to preserve audio quality in low-bandwidth scenarios
• Calls automatically reconnect if the network drops and is restored within two minutes

You can conduct a system compatibility check at https://www.hackerrank.com/compatibility, which assesses audio/video permissions, internet strength, and other key parameters. This proactive measure is designed to ensure a smooth experience and identify technical issues before the interview.

If you continue experiencing Zoom connectivity issues after running the compatibility check and trying the bandwidth optimization features (like turning off video), the system should automatically attempt to reconnect if your network is restored within two minutes.

Source: Audio and Video Calls in Interviews Powered by Zoom
justification: Strong coverage from on-domain HackerRank interview documentation. The corpus provides specific troubleshooting guidance for Zoom connectivity issues including bandwidth optimization and automatic reconnection features, plus directs to the compatibility check tool.

issue:
I would like to request a rescheduling of my  company "Company Name" HackerRank assessment due to unforeseen circumstances
that prevented me from attending the test at the scheduled time.
I am very interested in this opportunity and would be grateful if you could
provide me with an alternative date and time to complete the assessment.
Thank you for your understanding and support.
response:
I understand you need to reschedule your HackerRank assessment. However, the rescheduling process needs to be initiated by your company's hiring team, not by candidates directly.

According to HackerRank's system, rescheduling is done by the company administrators who:
1. Log in to their HackerRank for Work account
2. Go to Interviews > Interview List
3. Select the interview to reschedule
4. Click 'Invite Participants' and update the date, time, and other details
5. The system automatically sends email notifications to candidates with the updated time

I recommend contacting your company's HR department or the person who sent you the original assessment invitation. They will need to reschedule the assessment from their end, and you'll receive an updated invitation with the new date and time.

Source: Reschedule an Interview Prerequisites Rescheduling an Interview
justification: Strong coverage from on-domain HackerRank corpus about interview rescheduling. The user is a candidate requesting to reschedule their assessment, but the corpus clearly shows rescheduling must be done by the company/interviewer side, not the candidate. This is a routine product question with clear procedural guidance available.

issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause
response:
You can pause your HackerRank subscription instead of canceling it. Here's how to do it:

1. Click on the profile icon in the top-right corner and select Settings
2. Navigate to the Billing section under Subscription
3. Click the Cancel Plan button - this will display a prompt about the Pause Subscription feature
4. Select your desired pause duration (minimum 1 month, maximum 12 months)

To use this feature, you need:
- An active subscription that started at least 30 days ago
- A monthly subscription for Individual Monthly - Basic or Interview Monthly plans

You can also extend the pause period later if needed by going back to the Billing page and selecting Extend Pause.

Source: Pause Subscription
justification: Strong coverage with on-domain content that directly addresses the user's request to pause their subscription. The corpus provides complete step-by-step instructions for pausing a HackerRank subscription, including prerequisites and extension options.

issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
subject: Certificate name update
response:
Yes, you can update the name on your certificate. HackerRank allows you to update the name on your certificate only once per account, and when you update your name, the change applies to all your certificates.

To update the name on your certificate:
1. Open your certificate page
2. In the Full Name field, enter the name you want to display
3. Click Regenerate Certificate
4. In the confirmation dialog, click Update Name

The platform will update your certificate with the new name. Please note that after you update it, you cannot change it again.

Source: Certifications FAQs
justification: Strong coverage - the corpus directly addresses certificate name updates with complete step-by-step instructions. The user's request for a name correction on their certificate is fully covered by the FAQ section which explains the process and limitations.

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response:
To stop Claude from crawling your website, you can block Anthropic's crawlers by adding directives to your robots.txt file. Anthropic respects industry standard directives in robots.txt and honors "do not crawl" signals.

To block ClaudeBot from your entire website, add this to the robots.txt file in your top-level directory:

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

Please do this for every subdomain that you wish to opt out from. You can also limit crawling activity by using the Crawl-delay extension:

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Crawl-delay: 1

Anthropic uses different robots for various purposes including model development, web search, and retrieving web content at users' direction. Their crawling follows principles of transparency and aims to be non-intrusive while respecting anti-circumvention technologies.

Source: Does Anthropic crawl data from the web, and how can site owners block the crawler?
justification: Strong coverage from on-domain Claude corpus excerpt that directly addresses the user's request to stop website crawling. The article provides specific technical instructions for blocking Anthropic's crawlers using robots.txt directives, which fully answers the user's question.

issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
subject: Claude for students
response:
To set up Claude LTI for your students in Canvas, you'll need to follow these steps as an administrator:

**Creating Claude LTI Developer Key in Canvas:**
1. Sign in as an administrator and navigate to Admin -> Developer Keys
2. Click "+ Developer Key" then "+ LTI Key"
3. Enter the following configuration:
   - Key Name: Claude LTI
   - Description: Enter a short description for the Canvas LTI 1.3 app
   - Redirect URIs: https://claude.ai/lti/launch
   - Title: Claude LTI
   - Target Link URI: https://claude.ai/lti/launch
   - OpenID Connect Initiation Url: https://claude.ai/api/lti/login
   - JWK method: https://claude.ai/api/lti/keys
4. Under Additional Settings, toggle Privacy Level to Public
5. Under Placements, remove the defaults and add "Course Navigation" and "Assignment Edit"
6. Click "Save" and toggle the state to "On"

**Installing Claude LTI as an App:**
1. In Canvas, go to Admin -> Settings -> Apps
2. Click "View App Configurations" then select "+ App"
3. Select Configuration Type "By Client ID"
4. Input the Client ID generated for your developer key (from step 6 above)
5. Click "Install" and refresh the course page

These steps are intended for Claude for Education administrators and Learning Management Systems (LMS) administrators.

Source: Set up the Claude LTI in Canvas by Instructure
justification: Strong coverage with on-domain match. The corpus provides complete step-by-step instructions for setting up Claude LTI integration in Canvas, which directly addresses the professor's request for setting up Claude LTI for students.

issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
response: In the US Virgin Islands, merchants are permitted to set a minimum transaction amount of US$10 for Visa credit cards. This is an exception that applies specifically in the USA and US territories like Puerto Rico, the US Virgin Islands, and Guam. While merchants generally cannot establish minimum or maximum amounts for Visa transactions, this $10 minimum is allowed for credit cards in these locations. If the merchant is requiring more than $10 or applying this minimum to a debit card, you should notify your Visa card issuer. Source: Can a merchant set a maximum or minimum limit for using my Visa card?
justification: Strong coverage with exact match to user's location and situation. The corpus directly addresses minimum spend requirements in US Virgin Islands, confirming the $10 minimum is permitted for credit cards in that territory.
